title: Users of accounting information
summary: 9706 — stakeholders, their needs, and qualitative characteristics of information.
learningObjectives: Identify internal and external users of accounts.
Explain information needs of each user group.

simpleExplanation.title: Who reads the accounts?
simpleExplanation.summary: Investors, lenders, employees, and tax authorities all use accounts differently — good information must be relevant, reliable, and comparable.

sections.content: **Users of information** (1.6.1) — match **user → decision → ratio/info needed**.

sections.label: Mark a users of accounts question
